---
title: "Neural Differential Equations and Universal Differential Equations"
subtitle: "Track D — Scientific Machine Learning"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Neural Differential Equations and Universal Differential Equations

**Track**: Track D — Scientific Machine Learning

The core course of the SciML track: using neural networks inside differential equations to create hybrid mechanistic-data-driven models. Covers neural ODEs, physics-informed neural networks, and the universal differential equation framework.

## Table of Contents

1. Neural ODEs: Continuous-Depth Neural Networks
2. Training Neural ODEs: Sensitivity Analysis
3. Universal Differential Equations (UDEs)
4. Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs)
5. Neural Operators: DeepONet and Fourier Neural Operator
6. Neural SDEs and Stochastic Models
7. Structure-Preserving Neural Networks
8. Surrogate Modeling and Emulation
9. Inverse Problems and System Identification with SciML
10. Case Studies: SciML Across Domains

---

## Chapter 1: Neural ODEs: Continuous-Depth Neural Networks

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Training Neural ODEs: Sensitivity Analysis

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Universal Differential Equations (UDEs)

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs)

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Neural Operators: DeepONet and Fourier Neural Operator

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Neural SDEs and Stochastic Models

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Structure-Preserving Neural Networks

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Surrogate Modeling and Emulation

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 9: Inverse Problems and System Identification with SciML

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 10: Case Studies: SciML Across Domains

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
